summary.text: Provides extension methods for adding SurrealDB resources to the application model.

members.name: AddDatabase
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<SurrealDbDatabaseResource> SurrealDbBuilderExtensions.AddDatabase(this IResourceBuilder<SurrealDbNamespaceResource> builder, string name, string? databaseName = null)

summary.text: Adds a SurrealDB database to the application model. This is a child resource of a

remarks.text: Add a SurrealDB container to the application model and reference it in a .NET project.

databaseName.text: The name of the database. If not provided, this defaults to the same value as

name.text: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

name.text: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

members.name: AddSurrealServer
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<SurrealDbServerResource> SurrealDbBuilderExtensions.AddSurrealServer(this IDistributedApplicationBuilder builder, string name, IResourceBuilder<ParameterResource>? userName = null, IResourceBuilder<ParameterResource>? password = null, int? port = null, string path = "memory", bool strictMode = false)

summary.text: Adds a SurrealDB resource to the application model. A container is used for local development. The default image is
and the tag is

remarks.text: Add a SurrealDB container to the application model and reference it in a .NET project.

name.text: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

password.text: The parameter used to provide the administrator password for the SurrealDB resource. If
a random password will be generated.

path.text: Sets the path for storing data. If no argument is given, the default of
for non-persistent storage in memory is assumed.

port.text: The host port for the SurrealDB instance.

strictMode.text: Whether strict mode is enabled on the server.

userName.text: The parameter used to provide the administrator username for the SurrealDB resource.

summary.text: Defines the SQL script used to create the namespace.

script.text: The SQL script used to create the namespace.

summary.text: Defines the SQL script used to create the database.

script.text: The SQL script used to create the database.

members.name: WithDataBindMount
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<SurrealDbServerResource> SurrealDbBuilderExtensions.WithDataBindMount(this IResourceBuilder<SurrealDbServerResource> builder, string source)

summary.text: Adds a bind mount for the data folder to a SurrealDB resource.

remarks.text: Add a SurrealDB container to the application model and reference it in a .NET project. Additionally, in this example a bind mount is added to the container to allow data to be persisted across container restarts.

source.text: The source directory on the host to mount into the container.

members.name: WithDataVolume
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<SurrealDbServerResource> SurrealDbBuilderExtensions.WithDataVolume(this IResourceBuilder<SurrealDbServerResource> builder, string? name = null)

summary.text: Adds a named volume for the data folder to a SurrealDB resource.

remarks.text: Add a SurrealDB container to the application model and reference it in a .NET project. Additionally, in this example a data volume is added to the container to allow data to be persisted across container restarts.

name.text: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

members.name: WithInitFiles
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<SurrealDbServerResource> SurrealDbBuilderExtensions.WithInitFiles(this IResourceBuilder<SurrealDbServerResource> builder, string source)

summary.text: Copies init files into a SurrealDB container resource.

source.text: The source file on the host to copy into the container.

description.text: SurrealDB only support importing a single script file.

members.name: WithLogLevel
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<SurrealDbServerResource> SurrealDbBuilderExtensions.WithLogLevel(this IResourceBuilder<SurrealDbServerResource> builder, LogLevel logLevel)

summary.text: Configures logging level for the SurrealDB container resource.
